message:
fix(connectors): pagination schemas, exec validation, timestamps, C3.4 tokens

Notion:
- Added next_cursor to output schemas for query_database,
  get_block_children, list_comments, and search operations
- get_block_children and list_comments were silently dropping
  next_cursor from actual response — now included

Kubernetes:
- EventSubscription::new() used hardcoded "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  placeholder — replaced with utc_now_iso8601() using Hinnant's
  civil date algorithm
- op_exec silently dropped non-string command array elements via
  filter_map — now rejects with descriptive error per element

Jira/Linear/Notion:
- Unit test generate_valid_token() missing mandatory C3.4
  constraints — added CapabilityConstraints with resource_allow: ["*"]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
